settings.layout_iterations_help: How long the layout runs. Higher means more stable and organized.
settings.layout_spacing_help: How spread out the graph is. Higher means less crowded.
settings.edge_curvature_help: How curved the lines are. Higher means smoother lines in dense areas.
settings.community_separation_help: How far apart different communities are pushed. Higher means more distinct clusters.
settings.exclude_friends_help: Selected friends will be hidden from the graph.

social_automation.status_schedule_description: Change status and message by time, optionally only while VRChat is running.
social_automation.room_status_rules_description: Change status from room and friend context while VRChat is running.
social_automation.invite_request_auto_reply_description: Auto-invite allowlisted friends who ask to join while VRChat is running.
social_automation.schedule_rules_description: Time windows can change status, status message, or both.
social_automation.run_every_day_hint: Leave all unchecked to run every day.
social_automation.only_when_game_running_description: Skip this rule when VRChat is not running.
social_automation.restore_previous_status_description: When the time window ends, restore the status and status message this rule changed. Turn this off to keep the scheduled values.
social_automation.legacy_mode_description: These settings keep the previous automatic status behavior visible.
social_automation.enable_legacy_auto_status_description: Automatically change status when you are alone or with other people.
social_automation.alone_condition: When should VRCX treat you as alone?
social_automation.any_player_counts_as_company: Any player means I am with people
social_automation.only_friends_count_as_company: Only friends count as people with me
social_automation.friend_groups_counted_as_company: Friend groups that count as people with me
social_automation.allowed_room_types: Room types where this can run
social_automation.room_social_rules_description: Additional rules can change status or status message by priority.
social_automation.room_types_hint: Leave empty for any room type. Rules that make you appear joinable should stay limited.
social_automation.auto_send_invites_description: Only allowlisted favorite friends are handled automatically.
social_automation.allowlist_mode_description: Automatic replies still require your current room to allow invites.
social_automation.automatic_replies_note: Automatic replies only run while VRChat is running and your current location can send invites. Cooldown is enforced per sender, and notifications are hidden only after the invite API succeeds.
social_automation.failed_to_save_room_settings: Failed to save room automation settings.
social_automation.failed_to_load_invite_settings: Failed to load invite request auto-reply settings.
social_automation.failed_to_save_invite_settings: Failed to save invite request auto-reply settings.

mcp_server.description: Expose local VRCX-0 social facts to trusted MCP clients on localhost.
mcp_server.enable_description: Starts a localhost-only HTTP MCP server protected by a bearer token.
mcp_server.allow_vrchat_writes_description: When off, favorite-to-VRChat tool calls are forced to dry-run. Turn on to let AI write favorites to your real VRChat account. Resets to off each time the server starts.
mcp_server.port_description: Changing it restarts the server. If 8798 is taken, pick a free port and re-copy the client config.
mcp_server.client_config_description: Pick the option that matches your client. Claude Code: copies a one-time `claude mcp add` command that you run in your terminal to register the server. Generic (HTTP): copies a JSON config that connects directly to the server over HTTP — no extra tools needed. Generic (mcp-remote): copies a JSON config that tunnels through a Node.js proxy process for clients without native HTTP support (e.g. Claude Desktop); requires Node.js in your PATH.
mcp_server.security_note: Client configs contain a plain-text token. Only share them with local tools you trust.
mcp_server.rotate_token_description: Old client configs stop working after rotation.

diagnostics_maintenance.purge_avatar_history_description: Open the cleanup confirmation before deleting old avatar change records.

vrcx_updater.updater_disabled: Updater disabled, updates are handled by your package manager.

application.startup_system_description: Creates a desktop autostart entry that launches VRCX-0 with --autostart.
application.background_mode: Switch to Background Mode When Minimized to Tray
application.background_mode_description: Automatically switch to background mode when minimized to tray. Reduces memory usage to 10% as before. Some page states may reset when restored.
application.auto_install_updates_on_startup_descript: When enabled, VRCX-0 checks for updates when the app starts. If an installable update is available, it will download, install, and restart automatically.
application.proxy_description: Set the proxy server used by VRCX-0. Restart is required to apply a changed proxy.
application.startup_linux: Add the "--autostart" arg to the VRCX-0.desktop file to start VRCX-0 minimized at system startup

favorites.header_tooltip: When the favorites filter is enabled on Feed, Game Log, Notifications Page, or VR Overlay, only entries from the selected groups will be shown

automation.auto_state_change_tooltip: Configure automatic status changes based on your current room and who is with you
automation.auto_state_change_switch_tooltip: Automatically change status when there are other people in the instance (Alone / Company)
automation.auto_invite_request_accept_tooltip: Automatically accept invite requests from favorite friends

legal_notice.info: VRCX-0 is an assistant application for VRChat that helps manage friendships and provides related information. This application makes use of the unofficial VRChat API SDK.
legal_notice.disclaimer1: VRCX-0 is not endorsed by VRChat and does not reflect the views or opinions of VRChat or anyone officially involved in producing or managing VRChat properties. VRChat and all associated properties are trademarks or registered trademarks of VRChat Inc. VRChat © VRChat Inc.
legal_notice.disclaimer2: All contributors are not responsible for any problems caused by VRCX-0. Use at your own risk!

appearance.font_family_custom_dialog_description: Enter a valid CSS font-family value
appearance.font_family_custom_invalid: Invalid font-family. Use comma-separated font names, e.g. 'My Font', Arial, sans-serif
appearance.vrcplus_profile_icons_description: Use VRChat+ exclusive profile icons when available.
appearance.age_gated_instances_description: Show age-restricted instances. When disabled, these instances are hidden and shown as restricted.
appearance.nicknames_description: Show your custom local note names after usernames.
appearance.table_page_sizes_description: Add, remove, and select the page-size options shown in table controls.
appearance.table_page_sizes_error: Page size must be a number between 1 and 1000
appearance.accessible_status_indicators_description: Use shapes in addition to color to distinguish statuses.
appearance.table_entries_settings_description: Control how many items are loaded for lists and searches.

timedate.week_starts_on_description: Choose the first day of the week. Affects calendars, charts, and activity views.

user_dialog.vrcx_memos_description: Shows local notes saved in VRCX-0
user_dialog.recent_action_cooldown_description: Show a clock icon on recent invite and request actions.

user_colors.random_colors_from_user_id_description: Assign a consistent color to each user based on their ID.
user_colors.trust_colors_description: Customize the colors used for trust-level names.

notifications.post_update_changelog_prompt_description: Shows a persistent prompt after the app starts on a newly installed version.
notifications.wrist_overlay_description: Starts the SteamVR wrist feed only while VRChat is in VR and SteamVR is running.

webhook.examples_description: Choose Generic JSON fields and inspect what VRCX-0 sends for each webhook payload format.
webhook.comments_note: The examples show the request body shape; the field notes here explain usage and are not sent.
webhook.field_event: event and category identify the notification type and grouping.
webhook.field_title_message: title and message are the localized notification text.
webhook.field_user: user.id and user.displayName identify the related VRChat user when one is available.
webhook.field_location: location is the display location; locationId keeps the raw VRChat location value. worldId and worldName provide parsed world context when available.
webhook.field_timestamp: timestamp is UTC; localTime is the same time formatted locally.
webhook.field_discord: Discord format maps the same data into content and embeds for Discord webhooks.
webhook.fields_description: Choose which fields are included in Generic JSON webhook payloads.
webhook.fields_dialog_note: Field selection only affects Generic JSON webhook payloads. Desktop notifications, VR notifications, TTS, and Discord webhook payloads are unchanged.
webhook.fields_disabled_note: Field selection is editable only when Webhook delivery is enabled and Payload Format is Generic JSON.

text_to_speech.use_memo_nicknames: Use Local Note Nicknames for TTS

steamvr_wrist_overlay.description: * Runs automatically while VRChat is running.
steamvr_wrist_overlay.grip: Grip: Vive or Other Controllers Grab, Oculus X/A Buttons
steamvr_wrist_overlay.menu: Menu: Vive Menu, Index B, Oculus Y/B Buttons

discord_presence.description: * Only active while in an instance.
discord_presence.enable_tooltip: Disable VRChat's Rich Presence to avoid conflicts.
discord_presence.world_integration_tooltip: Show "Watching/Listening to" for Popcorn Palace, PyPyDance, VRDancing and LS Media

relaunch_vrchat.description: Automatically relaunch and rejoin the last instance after a crash.

auto_cache_management.description: Automatically clean up old cache data when closing VRChat.

self_invite.description: Use self invite instead of opening the instance in VRChat.

anonymous_usage_telemetry.description: Collect only necessary anonymous information to help improve VRCX-0.

save_instance_prints_to_file.description: Save spawned prints to your VRChat Pictures folder
save_instance_prints_to_file.crop: Automatically Remove White Border from Prints
save_instance_prints_to_file.crop_convert_old: Would you like to crop all prints that have already been saved?

save_instance_stickers_to_file.description: Save placed stickers to your VRChat Pictures folder

save_instance_emoji_to_file.description: Save spawned emoji to your VRChat Pictures folder

delete_all_screenshot_metadata.ask: Are you sure you want to delete all VRChat & VRCX-0 screenshot metadata from your VRChat Pictures folder?
delete_all_screenshot_metadata.confirm: Deleting all screenshot metadata is a very destructive action and cannot be undone! This includes all prints, sub folders and other unrelated images in your VRChat Pictures folder, if these photos are precious to you, please make a backup before proceeding.

remote_database.enable_description: Enables fetching avatar data from a remote database

youtube_api.enable_tooltip: Fetches video titles for use with gameLog and duration for overlay progress bar

translation_api.enable_tooltip: Translate user bios and world descriptions on demand.

video_progress_pie.enable_tooltip: Requires SteamVR overlay to be enabled

launch_commands.show_confirmation_on_switch_avatar_toolt: When disabled, VRCX-0 will not ask for confirmation before switching avatars.

screenshot_helper.description: Embed world and instance data into VRChat screenshots as PNG metadata.
screenshot_helper.description_tooltip: Windows does not display PNG text metadata natively. Use tools like ExifTool or a PNG inspector to view it.
screenshot_helper.modify_filename_tooltip: Will add the World ID to screenshot filename, in addition to file metadata.

data_directory.description: Active source: {source}. Changing this only saves the folder location; VRCX-0 will not copy data.
data_directory.cli_override: This launch is using --data-dir. Start without the command-line override to change the saved directory.
data_directory.confirm_description: VRCX-0 will not copy current data. To keep your login, database, configuration, and cache, copy the current data directory to {path} yourself before restarting. Save this directory and restart to apply it.
data_directory.confirm_empty: The selected folder is empty and will start as a new profile unless you copy data into it.
data_directory.confirm_missing_profile: The selected folder does not contain VRCX-0.sqlite3 or VRCX-0.json and may start as a new profile.
data_directory.saved_restart_required: Data directory saved. Restart VRCX-0 to apply it.
data_directory.reset_confirm_description: VRCX-0 will use the default data directory after restart. No files will be copied.
data_directory.reset_saved: Data directory reset. Restart VRCX-0 to apply it.
data_directory.failed_to_load: Failed to load data directory settings.

database_cleanup.auto_cleanup_description: Checked once per week on startup
database_cleanup.purge_confirm_description_1: This will permanently delete avatar change records from the database and reclaim disk space.
database_cleanup.purge_confirm_description_3: VRCX-0 will restart after the operation completes.
database_cleanup.purge_confirm_alert: It is strongly recommended to back up your database file before proceeding!
database_cleanup.legacy_migration_description: Replace the current VRCX-0 configuration and database with data from the fixed VRCX data folder.
database_cleanup.legacy_migration_confirm_title: Replace VRCX-0 data with VRCX data?
database_cleanup.legacy_migration_confirm_description: This will delete and replace the current VRCX-0 settings and local database with the data found at {path}. VRCX-0 will restart to complete the migration. The original VRCX data will not be modified.
database_cleanup.legacy_migration_not_available: No supported VRCX database was found.
database_cleanup.legacy_migration_restart_manually: Migration is ready. Restart VRCX-0 to complete it.
